name: Playtest 15: Cursed Crypt
description:
TESTS: Player-controlled lair action popup (DM chooses), lair action pass button, consecutive-round filtering (same action can't fire twice in a row), lair turn with player-controlled enemies, lair actions coexisting with legendary actions on the same encounter, lair + legendary interleaving across turns, damage+condition combo (Grasping Graves applies restrained on fail).

Two fighters breach a cursed crypt where a Vampire Lord and skeleton guards await. The crypt itself fights back with supernatural effects. All enemies AND lair actions are player-controlled (use_ai_for_enemies=false) so the tester manually exercises the lair action popup.

lair_actions.name: Grasping Graves
lair_actions.description: Skeletal hands reach from the ground, clawing at the living.

lair_actions.name: Unholy Darkness
lair_actions.description: Supernatural darkness pulses through the crypt, draining life force.
